statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: Garage staging is now much easier to reach and understand on iPhone.

Changed:
- Added a Garage Dashboard `Parts Staging` card with live `need / staged` counts in [garage.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:1126).
- Added direct routes to saved maintenance staging from the Garage hero, static fallback dock, contextual bottom bar, command palette, and visual site map in [garage.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:39) and [shared-ui.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:1859).
- Tightened the staging parser so heading lines like `Oil Change Prep:` do not become parts-counter checklist items in [garage.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:351).
- Extended browser smoke coverage for the dashboard card, live count update, iPhone bottom-bar route, and no-overflow checks in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:493).
- Bumped the service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v283`.

Verification passed:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('garage.html')`
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v283-garage-staging-dashboard -SkipScreenshots`
- `git diff --check`

Screenshots captured:
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v283-garage-staging-dashboard-mobile.png`
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v283-garage-staging-route-mobile.png`
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v283-garage-staging-dashboard-desktop.png`

Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`. No internet research was needed because this slice changed local workflow/navigation only and did not alter vehicle facts.
